name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
description: Gentle foaming cleanser with ceramides and niacinamide that removes excess oil without disrupting the skin barrier.
how_to_use: Apply to damp skin, massage gently, rinse. Use morning and night.

name: Skin Perfecting 2% BHA Liquid Exfoliant
description: Leave-on exfoliant with salicylic acid that penetrates pores to remove blackheads, unclog pores, and reduce breakouts.
how_to_use: Apply once daily to clean, dry skin. Do not rinse off.

name: Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
description: High-strength vitamin B3 serum that visibly reduces the appearance of blemishes, congestion, and uneven skin tone.
how_to_use: Apply a few drops morning and/or evening before heavier creams.

name: Salicylic Acid 2% Face Serum
description: Salicylic acid serum that exfoliates inside pores, reduces acne-causing bacteria, and controls excess sebum.
how_to_use: Apply 2–3 drops on clean skin. Avoid eye area. Use PM only.

name: On-The-Spot Acne Treatment
description: Fast-acting spot treatment with benzoyl peroxide that kills acne-causing bacteria and reduces redness and swelling.
how_to_use: Apply a thin layer directly to pimples 1–3 times daily.

name: Moisturising Cream
tagline: For dry to very dry skin
description: Rich moisturizing cream with three essential ceramides and hyaluronic acid that restores and maintains the skin's natural barrier.
how_to_use: Apply to face and body as needed. Safe for daily use.

name: Hydro Boost Water Gel
tagline: Oil-free hydration that never feels heavy
description: Lightweight gel moisturizer with hyaluronic acid that quenches skin and keeps it hydrated all day without clogging pores.
how_to_use: Apply to cleansed skin every morning. Follow with SPF.

name: Hyaluronic Acid 2% + PGA
description: Multi-weight hyaluronic acid serum that delivers hydration at multiple skin depths, plumping and reducing fine dehydration lines.
how_to_use: Apply 3–5 drops to damp skin. Layer under moisturizer.

name: Natural Moisturising Factors + HA
description: Targets dehydration in the uppermost layers of the skin using compounds naturally found in healthy skin.
how_to_use: Apply evenly to face as the last skincare step.

name: Effaclar Mat Daily Moisturiser
description: Oil-free moisturizer that absorbs excess oil, minimizes pores, and provides a long-lasting matte finish.
how_to_use: Apply morning after cleansing. Can be used under makeup.

name: Glycolic Acid 7% Toning Solution
description: AHA exfoliating toner that removes dead skin cells, improves texture, reduces pore appearance, and enhances radiance.
how_to_use: Apply with a cotton pad to clean skin every PM. Avoid eye area. Use SPF next morning.

name: Alpha Arbutin 2% + HA
tagline: Reduces dark spots and uneven tone
description: Concentrated dark spot corrector with alpha arbutin and hyaluronic acid that targets existing hyperpigmentation and prevents new spots.
how_to_use: Apply 3–5 drops twice daily. Use SPF in the morning.

name: Alpha Arbutin 2% + HA
description: Lightweight serum targeting dark spots, post-acne marks, and sun-induced hyperpigmentation with minimal irritation.
how_to_use: Use 2–3 drops twice daily on clean skin. Follow with SPF.

name: Bright Complete Vitamin C Serum
description: Vitamin C brightening serum that reduces dark spots, evens skin tone, and boosts radiance with regular use.
how_to_use: Apply 2–3 drops every morning before moisturizer and SPF.

name: Vitamin C 10% Face Serum
description: Ethyl Ascorbic Acid-based Vitamin C serum that brightens, fades hyperpigmentation, and provides antioxidant protection.
how_to_use: Apply 2–3 drops every morning. Always follow with SPF.

name: Toleriane Hydrating Gentle Cleanser
description: Ultra-gentle milky cleanser that soothes and hydrates sensitive skin while effectively removing makeup and impurities.
how_to_use: Apply to dry or wet skin, massage gently, rinse or wipe off.

name: Hydrating Facial Cleanser
description: Hydrating non-foaming cleanser with ceramides and hyaluronic acid for sensitive skin that cleans without stripping.
how_to_use: Apply to wet skin, gently massage, rinse thoroughly.

name: Cicalfate+ Restorative Protective Cream
description: Antibacterial and soothing cream that repairs damaged skin barriers, reduces redness, and protects irritated or reactive skin.
how_to_use: Apply a thin layer to affected areas once or twice daily.

name: Granactive Retinoid 2% Emulsion
description: Next-generation retinoid serum targeting multiple signs of aging — fine lines, uneven tone, and loss of elasticity — with minimal irritation.
how_to_use: Apply PM only. Start 3x/week, increase gradually. Always use SPF next morning.

name: Retinol 0.6% Face Serum
description: Pure retinol serum that accelerates cell turnover, reduces wrinkles, smooths texture, and improves overall skin radiance.
how_to_use: Use PM only, 2–3 times per week. Gradually increase frequency.

name: "Buffet" Multi-Technology Peptide Serum
description: Multi-peptide serum combining multiple technologies targeting multiple signs of aging simultaneously.
how_to_use: Apply a few drops twice daily before oils and creams.

name: Regenerist Micro-Sculpting Cream
description: Regenerating moisturizer with amino-peptides and B3 that visibly firms skin, reduces fine lines, and improves elasticity.
how_to_use: Apply morning and night to cleansed face and neck.

name: AHA 30% + BHA 2% Peeling Solution
description: 10-minute weekly facial peel with AHA and BHA that resurfaces skin, reduces dark spots, and improves overall clarity.
how_to_use: Apply to dry face for 10 minutes max, once a week. Rinse thoroughly. Not for sensitive skin.

name: Multi-Peptide Serum for Hair Density
description: Scalp serum with a combination of peptides, caffeine, and procapil that targets hair density and reduces visible hair thinning.
how_to_use: Apply to dry or towel-dried scalp, section by section. Do not rinse. Use daily.

name: Minoxidil 5% Topical Solution
description: FDA-approved topical solution that reactivates hair follicles and stimulates regrowth in areas of thinning.
how_to_use: Apply 1ml to dry scalp twice daily. Results visible after 3–6 months.

name: Stimuliste Scalp Tonic
tagline: Energises the scalp for fuller hair
description: Lightweight scalp tonic with quality hair fibres that strengthens hair texture and improves density perception.
how_to_use: Apply to dry or wet scalp, massage gently. Do not rinse.

name: Onion Hair Oil for Hair Regrowth
description: Onion oil-based hair treatment rich in sulfur that nourishes follicles, reduces breakage, and promotes regrowth.
how_to_use: Apply to scalp and hair, massage for 10 mins. Leave for 30 mins or overnight. Wash off.

name: Bio Bhringraj Therapeutic Hair Oil
description: Traditional Bhringraj-based oil that improves circulation, strengthens roots, and reduces premature hair fall.
how_to_use: Massage into scalp, leave for at least 1 hour. Wash with mild shampoo.

name: T/Gel Therapeutic Shampoo
description: Coal tar-based medicated shampoo that controls itching, flaking, and scaling associated with dandruff and seborrheic dermatitis.
how_to_use: Use twice weekly. Massage into wet scalp, leave for 5 minutes, rinse thoroughly.

name: Anti-Dandruff Shampoo (Ketoconazole 1%)
tagline: Targets fungal dandruff at the source
description: Antifungal shampoo with ketoconazole that targets Malassezia fungus — the primary cause of dandruff — for lasting relief.
how_to_use: Apply to wet hair twice a week, lather for 3–5 minutes, rinse. Use for 4 weeks.

name: Ginger Scalp Care Shampoo
description: Ginger-enriched shampoo that soothes and cleanses a flaky scalp, reducing itching and dandruff with regular use.
how_to_use: Apply to wet hair, massage into scalp, rinse. Use regularly.

name: Classic Clean Shampoo
description: Clinically proven anti-dandruff shampoo with zinc pyrithione that eliminates dandruff flakes and keeps scalp healthy.
how_to_use: Use daily or as needed. Lather, leave 1–2 mins, rinse.

name: Sensibio H2O Micellar Water
description: Dermatologist-developed micellar water that removes makeup and impurities without rubbing, ideal for hypersensitive skin.
how_to_use: Soak a cotton pad, gently wipe face without rubbing. No rinsing required.

name: Sebium Foaming Gel
description: Purifying cleanser for oily and acne-prone skin that removes excess sebum, reduces congestion and restores microbiome balance.
how_to_use: Apply to wet skin, foam gently, rinse. Morning and evening.

name: Rapid Wrinkle Repair Retinol Serum
tagline: Visibly reduces wrinkles in one week
description: Fast-acting retinol serum with glucose complex that smooths deep wrinkles, fades age spots, and improves skin texture.
how_to_use: Apply PM only. Use SPF every morning. Avoid if pregnant.
